title: French Chicken and Noodle Soup
description: A hearty French-inspired soup made with chicken, noodles, and a hint of Vietnamese spices.

ingredients.name: noodles
ingredients.notes: French bread noodles or egg noodles

ingredients.name: vietnamese chili flakes
ingredients.notes: Add a spicy kick to the soup

ingredients.name: carrot
ingredients.notes: Diced for added flavor and nutrition

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: Diced for added flavor and nutrition

ingredients.name: chicken broth
ingredients.notes: Low-sodium chicken broth for a rich flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: For a light and refreshing soup

instructions: Bring the chicken broth and water to a boil in a large pot.
Add the diced onion, carrot, and minced garlic. Simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the noodles and cook until tender, about 8-10 minutes.
Stir in the Vietnamese chili flakes for added flavor.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with crisp lettuce and a side of crusty bread.
